message:
Use POSIX file I/O to avoid Dropbox File Provider EDEADLK deadlocks

Foundation's NSFileCoordinator deadlocks (EDEADLK / POSIX error 11) with
Dropbox's File Provider Extension. Replace all Foundation file operations
in the hot path with POSIX equivalents: open/write/close for files,
mkdir for directories. This eliminates the file coordination layer that
triggers the deadlock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
